Chrome CDP scraping of X/Twitter is a deprecated/broken approach — X has aggressively rolled out anti-bot measures (TLS fingerprinting, login walls, JS challenges) that make headless Chrome scraping unreliable since 2023+. Modern alternatives would use the official X API (paid) or third-party APIs.
Hardcoded user-specific path `/Users/mojoai/.hermes/swarm/data/agents.db` indicates documentation tied to a single developer's machine — not portable and likely stale if that environment is inactive.
